commit_scope: Deepen the Anything-Arrives Room with program, story, media, API, local I/O, and physical I/O carriers.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 10 https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/concepts/lc-anything-arrives-room | jq '{id, story_chars: (.story_content | length), has_io_carriers: (.story_content | contains("## Program, Story, Media, API, and I/O Carriers")), has_physical_io: (.story_content | contains("## Physical I/O for Vitality, Assistance, and Care")), has_local_io: (.story_content | contains("Local I/O as a reversible spell with fingerprints"))}'
local_validation.summary: The Anything-Arrives Room was deepened with program runs, story API surfaces, visual frames, audio streams, API calls, local I/O transactions, and permissioned physical I/O as traceable carriers. The companion Form file now exposes local_resource_transaction_shape plus digital carrier traces and physical-care traces. Local wellness is aligned, the full local substrate audit passes, and the public KB concept now includes digital carriers, physical I/O, and local I/O with 19163 story characters.

phase_gate.reason: Docs-only local and public KB validation has passed; CI and post-merge deploy validation are pending until PR flow completes.
